member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Action.AutoAttackBehaviour
member.summary: 0 = no effect on auto attacks, 1 = typical cast (unsheathe weapon, but don't touch autos), 2 = typical weaponskill (unsheathe, start autos if action target is primary target), 3 = sleep-like effect (unsheathe, stop autos), 4 = typical point-blank aoe (unsheathe, start autos if primary target is within action range), 5 = ??? (doesn't touch weapon state), 6 = typical channeled action (unsheathe, stop autos, do not auto-face target), 7 = force sheathe and stop autos, 8 = ??? (unused)

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Action.EquivalenceGroup
member.summary: set for eg crafting actions, when different jobs have different rows, but they need to be considered interchangeable

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Action.DeadTargetBehaviour
member.summary: 0 = can not target dead, 1 = can only target dead players (+ some other conditions), 2 = ???

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Battalion.IsEnemyTo
member.summary: Index is the other battalion.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.CharaCardDecoration.Component
member.summary: 1 = Backing, 2 = Pattern Overlay, 3 = Portrait Frame, 4 = Plate Frame, 5 = Accent

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ChocoboTaxi.TimeRequired
member.summary: In minutes.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ClassJob.JobType
member.summary:
1 = Tank
2 = Pure Healer
3 = Melee
4 = Physical Ranged
5 = Magical Ranged
6 = Barrier Healer

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ClassJobActionUI.ComboTreeLayout
member.summary: Used to position the action within a combo tree diagram. Non-zero digits identify branches within the combo (eg, Hakaze -> Shifu -> Kasha is 100 -> 120 -> 121)

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ClassJobActionUI.GroupedCell
member.summary: Currently only used for MNK actions; displays a set of actions in a shared rectangular cell instead of a tree.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Condition.LogMessagePriority
member.summary: The lower this number is, the higher the priority. Used to determine which conditions LogMessage should be printed.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Condition.IsNetworked
member.summary: Allows this Condition to be set by a packet received from the server.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentDirectorManagedSG.LayoutId
member.summary: Refers to an SGB instance in the level.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentFinderCondition.Unknown29
member.summary: This would show Addon#102618, if not 0, but the row is empty.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentFinderCondition.Unknown34
member.summary: Used to control what is displayed as player count (Addon#10806, Addon#10805, etc.). Has some weird logic behind it.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentFinderCondition.PenaltyTimestampArrayIndex
member.summary: Index in PlayerState.PenaltyTimestamps

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentFinderCondition.FixedItemLevelSync
member.summary: If true, the players item level is always set to ItemLevelSync (up-sync and down-sync possible).

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentMemberType.AllianceRegistrationMinPlayers
member.summary: Used as parameter for Addon#16461.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentMemberType.AlliancePartyCount
member.summary: For example, used for The Occult Crescent: South Horn, to allow queuing with alliance parties. If 0, use PartyCount.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentMemberType.Unknown6
member.summary: Unknown party count. If 0, use PartyCount.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentMemberType.AllowAllianceRegistration
member.summary: Displays Addon#10826.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentMemberType.SeparatedDpsRoles
member.summary: If true, displays MeleesPerParty and RangedPerParty separately (Addon#102593) instead of combining them (Addon#2513).

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentMemberType.RoleIndependent
member.summary: If true, displays Addon#102599 instead of Addon#2513 or Addon#102593.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentMemberType.OnlyPvPTeamMembers
member.summary: Displays Addon#102617.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentMemberType.AllowLimitedJobs
member.summary: Displays Addon#10829.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentRoulette.Unknown1
member.summary: This would show Addon#102618, but the row is empty.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentRoulette.TimeLimit
member.summary: In minutes.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentRoulette.TimeLimitMax
member.summary: In minutes. If 0, only TimeLimit is displayed.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentRoulette.PenaltyTimestampArrayIndex
member.summary: Index in PlayerState.PenaltyTimestamps

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentRoulette.CompletionArrayIndex
member.summary: Index in PlayerState.ContentRouletteCompletion

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentRoulette.AppliesHighestAverageDutyItemLevel
member.summary: Displays Addon#2828.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ContentRoulette.Unknown22
member.summary: This would show Addon#10833, but the row does not exist.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.DynamicEvent.Duration
member.summary: In minutes.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.EventGimmickPathMove.EventRange
member.summary: Refers to an instanced game object.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ExVersion.MenuScreen
member.summary: Equivalent to the last quest in column 6 of ScenarioTree

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ExVersion.Icon
member.summary: Can be used in various places for UI elements.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Fate.Location
member.summary: Instance ID of the EventRange where this spawns.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.FittingShopCategoryItem.DisplayId
member.summary: If not 0, the item will only appear if sent in a FittingShopUpdate packet.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GimmickRect.LayoutID
member.summary: The EventRange to associate with.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GimmickRect.TriggerIn
member.summary: 8 = Jump

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GoldSaucerArcadeMachine.Name
member.summary: Shown in the Duty List.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GoldSaucerArcadeMachine.PayoutExplanation
member.summary: Shown in the Duty List below Description.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GoldSaucerArcadeMachine.Description
member.summary: Shown in the Duty List.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GoldSaucerArcadeMachine.TotalPayoutText
member.summary: Shown in the Duty List if this machine has multiple rounds.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GoldSaucerArcadeMachine.Timeout
member.summary: How long until the machine shuts down, in seconds.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GoldSaucerTalk.NextTalk
member.summary: The next GoldSaucerTalk message.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GoldSaucerTalk.ChoicesTalk
member.summary: The next GoldSaucerTalk for the ChoicesText of the same index.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GroupPoseFrame.UnlockType
member.summary:
1 = Quest
2 = UnlockLink
3 = InstanceContent unlocked
4 = InstanceContent completed
5 = Emote unlocked
6 = Companion unlocked
7 = Mount unlocked
8 = Ornament unlocked
9 = FramersKit unlocked
10 = Always available

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.GroupPoseStamp.UnlockType
member.summary:
1 = Quest
2 = UnlockLink
3 = InstanceContent unlocked
4 = InstanceContent completed
5 = Emote unlocked
6 = Companion unlocked
7 = Mount unlocked
8 = Ornament unlocked
9 = FramersKit unlocked
10 = Always available

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.HousingFurniture.UsageType
member.summary:
0 = Static furnishing
3 = Vendor Permit
4 = Crafting Workbenche
7 = Food
8 = Aetherial Wheel
9 = Triple Triad Board
10 = Orchestrion
11 = Flowerpot
12 = Vase
13 = Aquarium
14 = Message Book
15 = Mannequin

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.HousingFurniture.PlaceLimitType
member.summary: Any furnishings with the same type are counted towards the limit. For example, all vendor permits are grouped together under the same key.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.HousingRenovation.Territory
member.summary: Also links to HousingIndoorTerritory which shares a 1:1 map of ids to TerritoryType

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.HousingYardObject.UsageType
member.summary:
0 = Static furnishing
2 = Garden Patch
5 = Chocobo Stable
6 = Duties Permit
14 = Message Book
16 = Striking Dummy

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.HousingYardObject.PlaceLimitType
member.summary: Any furnishings with the same type are counted towards the limit. For example, all garden patches are grouped together under the same key.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.IndividualWeather.IndividualWeatherDataStruct.Unknown0
member.summary: quest progress maybe

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.InstanceContent.LGBEventRange
member.summary: Points to the game object ID of the exit range.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.InstanceContent.LookupIndex
member.summary: Used for certain duties. If not 0, then the client reads from a special unlock/completed array in PlayerState.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.InstanceContentType.LookupIndex
member.summary: Used for certain duties. If not 0, then the client reads from a special unlock/completed array in PlayerState.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Item.FilterGroup
member.summary:
1 = Physical Weapon
2 = Magical Weapon
3 = Shield
4 = Gear
5 = Meal
6 = Medicine
7 = Deep Dungeon Usable (Manuals, Medicine, Potions)
8 = Potion (HP)
9 = Ether (MP)
10 = Elixir (HP+MP)
11 = Crystal
12 = Crafting Material
13 = Materia
14 = Housing
15 = Stain
16 = Misc (Various stuff)
17 = Fishing Bait
18 = Treasure Map
19 = Useables (Various stuff)
20 = Gardening Seed
21 = Gardening Soil
22 = Gardening Fertilizer
23 = Secret Recipe Book
24 = unused
25 = Aetherial Wheel
26 = Primed Aetherial Wheel
27 = Triple Triad Card
28 = Airship Component
29 = Currency
30 = Folklore Book
31 = Soul Crystal
32 = Orchestrion Roll
33 = Aquarium Tank Trimming
34 = Painting
35 = Tales Of Adventure Retainer
36 = Submersible Component
37 = Eureka Logos Action Ingredient
38 = Bozja Mettle
39 = Bozja Lost Action
40 = Bozjan Cluster
41 = unused
42 = unused
43 = Placeholder Item
44 = Belts
45 = ArchiveItem (RowId in AdditionalData)
46 = unused
47 = Sanctuary Cowrie
48 = Sanctuary Material
49 = Adventurers Parcel
50 = Cosmic Exploration Material
51 = Outfit
52 = Occult Crescent Knowledge
53 = Occult Crescent Phantom Experience
54 = Occult Crescent Enlightenment Piece
55 = Cosmic Exploration Cosmocredit
56 = Cosmic Exploration Lunar Credit
57 = Occult Crescent Sanguine Cipher

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.LogMessage.DisplayFlags
member.summary:
1 << 0 (0x1) = Print in Chat
1 << 2 (0x4) = WideText (layer 5, top)
1 << 3 (0x8) = ErrorText (not forced)
1 << 4 (0x10) = Text (no icons, no sounds)
1 << 5 (0x20) = WideText (layer 5, bottom, short)
1 << 6 (0x40) = WideText (layer 5, bottom, long)
1 << 7 (0x80) = PoisonText (layer 10)
1 << 8 (0x100) = ErrorText (forced)
1 << 9 (0x200) = WideText (layer 10, bottom, short)
1 << 10 (0x0400) = WideText (layer 10, bottom, long)
1 << 11 (0x0800) = GimmickHint (Info)
1 << 12 (0x1000) = GimmickHint (Warning)

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.LogMessage.Unknown1
member.summary: Enables a SceneFlags check to remove certain DisplayFlags (0xF883).

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.LogMessage.Duration
member.summary: Used for GimmickHint messages.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.LogMessage.Unknown2
member.summary: Uses the local players ScreenLogManager to print the message in chat, but only if the local player is the source. Unsure why.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.MKDData.Unknown8
member.summary: Minimum Knowledge Level?

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.MoveControl.RpWalkTurnSpeed
member.summary: Left/Right for the turn control scheme

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.MoveControl.RpWalkSpeed
member.summary: Forwards/backwards

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.MoveControl.RpWalkStrafeSpeed
member.summary: Left/Right for the strafe control scheme

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.MoveControl.BackpedalSpeed
member.summary: Standard controls backwards or legacy back+strafe

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.MoveControl.RotationStep
member.summary: Angle in degrees per step when turning

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.NotebookDivision.AllowedCraftTypes
member.summary: Index is CraftType

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.PatchMark.RequirementType
member.summary:
1 = Some Housing Permission 1
2 = Some Housing Permission 2
3 = Quest
4 = UnlockLink
5 = InstanceContent 50001 unlocked, but 50003 not
6 = LocalPlayer has a FreeCompanyTag

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.PlayerSearchSubLocation.Location
member.summary: The UI category this appears in.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Quest.DailyQuestPool
member.summary: 1/2 - normal daily beast tribe quests, 3 - 'exclusive' (if player's rank is not greater than max rank requirement of quests offered by npc, exactly one of the available quests will be from this pool)

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Quest.HideInScenarioGuide
member.summary: Shows ??? instead.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.RaidFinderParam.SeparatedHealerRoles
member.summary: Displays Addon#10115 instead of Addon#10093, to list pure and barrier healer count.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.RecastNavimesh.Name
member.summary: Corresponds to Name from TerritoryType.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Role.Type
member.summary: 1 = Tank, 2 = DPS, 3 = Healer

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.SatisfactionSupplyReward.MinLevelForSecondReward
member.summary: 0 == current cap

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.SecretRecipeBookGroup.SecretRecipeBook
member.summary: Index is CraftType, also used as bit index in PlayerState.UnlockedSecretRecipeBooks

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.SpecialShop.RequiredContentFinderConditionComplete
member.summary: If this is true, then the CFC needs to be completed; If this is false, then the CFC just needs to be unlocked

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.SpecialShop.ItemStruct.ItemCostsStruct.CostType
member.summary: Indicates what the Cost Id links to. 3 = SpecialBucketId, rest items?

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Status.Flags
member.summary: actually an index of the flag

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.TerritoryIntendedUse.GayaSoundId
member.summary: Ambient noise of people talking in a crowd. Values: 0 = None, 1 = sound/strm/GAYA_LestArea_01.scd, 2 = sound/strm/GAYA_Village_01.scd

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.TerritoryIntendedUse.EnableClassJobChangeCombatJobCheck
member.summary: When true, requires that the target ClassJob is a combat job

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.TerritoryIntendedUse.EnableCompanion
member.summary: Enables summoning Chocobo Companion

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.TerritoryIntendedUse.EnablePets
member.summary: Enables summoning Summoner/Scholar pets

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.TerritoryIntendedUse.Unknown31
member.summary: Related to Idle Cam

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.TerritoryIntendedUse.Unknown38
member.summary: Related to idle timer

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.TerritoryIntendedUse.Unknown41
member.summary: Related to blocking Say/Yell/Shout of a muted player in Eureka/Bozja/OccultCrescent

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.TradeScreenImage.BannerType
member.summary: 1 = Icon 180096 ("Excellent Trade!"), 2 = Icon 180097 ("Feat Accomplished!")

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.VVDData.Series
member.summary: RowId of VVDRouteData and VVDNotebookSeries

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.VVDData.Sequence
member.summary: Sequence inside of the series.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WeeklyBingoMultipleOrder.Content
member.summary: I *think* this is correct? You're welcome MidoriKami :3

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WeeklyBingoOrderData.ContentCategory
member.summary:
1= TreasureMaps
2= PvP

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSAchievement.Category
member.summary: Seems to be 1 for Daily and 2 for Standard

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSDevGrade.Thumbnail
member.summary: The image displayed when entering the Cosmic Exploration zone on a server that is currently at this stage.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSDevGrade.LodestoneRank
member.summary: The rank for a world that is currently at this stage, as displayed on the Lodestone site, minus one.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSEmergencyInfo.WKSEmergencyMissionRowId
member.summary: Has between 5 and 6 subrows

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSEmergencyMission.WKSEmergencyMissionGroupRowId
member.summary: As of Patch 7.31 this can always be direct queried with subrow 0 to get the follow chain to WKSMissionUnit from the sheet

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSEmergencyProblem.EmergencyInfoTeleportText1
member.summary: The first option to teleport

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSEmergencyProblem.EmergencyInfoTeleportText2
member.summary: The second option to teleport

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSFunction.RequiredQuests0
member.summary: Required quest needed for function to return true

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSFunction.RequiredQuests1
member.summary: Required quest needed for function to return true

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSFunction.RequiredQuests2
member.summary: Best guess for now as no references are easily found in the game files

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSFunction.RequiredDevGrade
member.summary: Needs this grade to be completed for function to be valid. Game checks for WKSManager.DevGrade < RequiredDevGrade[]

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSFunction.Unknown12
member.summary: Seems to only control one function tree for now relating to something in WKSManager but is also slated to check for '- 2 >= 2' and fail

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSMissionReward.ExpModifier
member.summary: ExpReward = ExpToNex * (lvl < 50 ? ExpModifier[0] : lvl < 90 ? ExpModifier[1] : ExpModifier[2]) / 100

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSMissionReward.BaseDronebits
member.summary: Doesn't take Gold bonus in to account

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSMissionReward.Unknown19
member.summary: Needs to match WKSEmergencyProblem.Unknown2 to be active?

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSPioneeringTrail.Thumbnail
member.summary: The image used as thumbnail for log entry in the Infrastructure Index.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.WKSPioneeringTrail.ActivationStage
member.summary: The stage at which the log entry is added to the Infrastructure Index.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.ZoneSharedGroup.RequirementType
member.summary:
1 = Quest
2 = Quest with specific Sequence
3 = AetherCurrent
4 = EurekaStoryProgress
5 = DomaStoryProgress

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Action.AutoAttackBehaviour
member.summary: 0 = no effect on auto attacks, 1 = typical cast (unsheathe weapon, but don't touch autos), 2 = typical weaponskill (unsheathe, start autos if action target is primary target), 3 = sleep-like effect (unsheathe, stop autos), 4 = typical point-blank aoe (unsheathe, start autos if primary target is within action range), 5 = ??? (doesn't touch weapon state), 6 = typical channeled action (unsheathe, stop autos, do not auto-face target), 7 = force sheathe and stop autos, 8 = ??? (unused)

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Action.EquivalenceGroup
member.summary: set for eg crafting actions, when different jobs have different rows, but they need to be considered interchangeable

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Action.DeadTargetBehaviour
member.summary: 0 = can not target dead, 1 = can only target dead players (+ some other conditions), 2 = ???

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Battalion.IsEnemyTo
member.summary: Index is the other battalion.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.CharaCardDecoration.Component
member.summary: 1 = Backing, 2 = Pattern Overlay, 3 = Portrait Frame, 4 = Plate Frame, 5 = Accent

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.ChocoboTaxi.TimeRequired
member.summary: In minutes.

member.summary:
1 = Tank
2 = Pure Healer
3 = Melee
4 = Physical Ranged
5 = Magical Ranged

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.GoldSaucerArcadeMachine.Description
member.summary: Shown in the Duty List.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.GoldSaucerArcadeMachine.TotalPayoutText
member.summary: Shown in the Duty List if this machine has multiple rounds.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.GoldSaucerArcadeMachine.Timeout
member.summary: How long until the machine shuts down, in seconds.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.GoldSaucerTalk.NextTalk
member.summary: The next GoldSaucerTalk message.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.GoldSaucerTalk.ChoicesTalk
member.summary: The next GoldSaucerTalk for the ChoicesText of the same index.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.GroupPoseFrame.UnlockType
member.summary:
1 = Quest
2 = UnlockLink
3 = InstanceContent unlocked
4 = InstanceContent completed
5 = Emote unlocked
6 = Companion unlocked
7 = Mount unlocked
8 = Ornament unlocked
9 = FramersKit unlocked
10 = Always available

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.GroupPoseStamp.UnlockType
member.summary:
1 = Quest
2 = UnlockLink
3 = InstanceContent unlocked
4 = InstanceContent completed
5 = Emote unlocked
6 = Companion unlocked
7 = Mount unlocked
8 = Ornament unlocked
9 = FramersKit unlocked
10 = Always available

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.HousingFurniture.UsageType
member.summary:
0 = Static furnishing
3 = Vendor Permit
4 = Crafting Workbenche
7 = Food
8 = Aetherial Wheel
9 = Triple Triad Board
10 = Orchestrion
11 = Flowerpot
12 = Vase
13 = Aquarium
14 = Message Book
15 = Mannequin

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.HousingFurniture.PlaceLimitType
member.summary: Any furnishings with the same type are counted towards the limit. For example, all vendor permits are grouped together under the same key.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.HousingRenovation.Territory
member.summary: Also links to HousingIndoorTerritory which shares a 1:1 map of ids to TerritoryType

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.HousingYardObject.UsageType
member.summary:
0 = Static furnishing
2 = Garden Patch
5 = Chocobo Stable
6 = Duties Permit
14 = Message Book
16 = Striking Dummy

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.HousingYardObject.PlaceLimitType
member.summary: Any furnishings with the same type are counted towards the limit. For example, all garden patches are grouped together under the same key.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.IndividualWeather.IndividualWeatherDataStruct.Unknown0
member.summary: quest progress maybe

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.InstanceContent.LGBEventRange
member.summary: Points to the game object ID of the exit range.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.InstanceContent.LookupIndex
member.summary: Used for certain duties. If not 0, then the client reads from a special unlock/completed array in PlayerState.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.InstanceContentType.LookupIndex
member.summary: Used for certain duties. If not 0, then the client reads from a special unlock/completed array in PlayerState.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Item.SubcategorySort
member.summary: Used in conjunction with the ItemUICategory sortkeys to sort things like vendor lists

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Item.FilterGroup
member.summary:
1 = Physical Weapon
2 = Magical Weapon
3 = Shield
4 = Gear
5 = Meal
6 = Medicine
7 = Deep Dungeon Usable (Manuals, Medicine, Potions)
8 = Potion (HP)
9 = Ether (MP)
10 = Elixir (HP+MP)
11 = Crystal
12 = Crafting Material
13 = Materia
14 = Housing
15 = Stain
16 = Misc (Various stuff)
17 = Fishing Bait
18 = Treasure Map
19 = Useables (Various stuff)
20 = Gardening Seed
21 = Gardening Soil
22 = Gardening Fertilizer
23 = Secret Recipe Book
24 = unused
25 = Aetherial Wheel
26 = Primed Aetherial Wheel
27 = Triple Triad Card
28 = Airship Component
29 = Currency
30 = Folklore Book
31 = Soul Crystal
32 = Orchestrion Roll
33 = Aquarium Tank Trimming
34 = Painting
35 = Tales Of Adventure Retainer
36 = Submersible Component
37 = Eureka Logos Action Ingredient
38 = Bozja Mettle
39 = Bozja Lost Action
40 = Bozjan Cluster
41 = unused
42 = unused
43 = Placeholder Item
44 = Belts
45 = ArchiveItem (RowId in AdditionalData)
46 = unused
47 = Sanctuary Cowrie
48 = Sanctuary Material
49 = Adventurers Parcel
50 = Cosmic Exploration Material
51 = Outfit
52 = Occult Crescent Knowledge
53 = Occult Crescent Phantom Experience
54 = Occult Crescent Enlightenment Piece
55 = Cosmic Exploration Cosmocredit
56 = Cosmic Exploration Lunar Credit
57 = Occult Crescent Sanguine Cipher

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.LogMessage.DisplayFlags
member.summary:
1 << 0 (0x1) = Print in Chat
1 << 2 (0x4) = WideText (layer 5, top)
1 << 3 (0x8) = ErrorText (not forced)
1 << 4 (0x10) = Text (no icons, no sounds)
1 << 5 (0x20) = WideText (layer 5, bottom, short)
1 << 6 (0x40) = WideText (layer 5, bottom, long)
1 << 7 (0x80) = PoisonText (layer 10)
1 << 8 (0x100) = ErrorText (forced)
1 << 9 (0x200) = WideText (layer 10, bottom, short)
1 << 10 (0x0400) = WideText (layer 10, bottom, long)
1 << 11 (0x0800) = GimmickHint (Info)
1 << 12 (0x1000) = GimmickHint (Warning)

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.LogMessage.Unknown1
member.summary: Enables a SceneFlags check to remove certain DisplayFlags (0xF883).

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.LogMessage.Duration
member.summary: Used for GimmickHint messages.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.LogMessage.Unknown2
member.summary: Uses the local players ScreenLogManager to print the message in chat, but only if the local player is the source. Unsure why.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.MKDData.Unknown8
member.summary: Minimum Knowledge Level?

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.MoveControl.RpWalkTurnSpeed
member.summary: Left/Right for the turn control scheme

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.MoveControl.RpWalkSpeed
member.summary: Forwards/backwards

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.MoveControl.RpWalkStrafeSpeed
member.summary: Left/Right for the strafe control scheme

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.MoveControl.BackpedalSpeed
member.summary: Standard controls backwards or legacy back+strafe

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.MoveControl.RotationStep
member.summary: Angle in degrees per step when turning

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.NotebookDivision.AllowedCraftTypes
member.summary: Index is CraftType

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.PatchMark.RequirementType
member.summary:
1 = Some Housing Permission 1
2 = Some Housing Permission 2
3 = Quest
4 = UnlockLink
5 = InstanceContent 50001 unlocked, but 50003 not
6 = LocalPlayer has a FreeCompanyTag

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.PlayerSearchSubLocation.Location
member.summary: The UI category this appears in.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Quest.DailyQuestPool
member.summary: 1/2 - normal daily beast tribe quests, 3 - 'exclusive' (if player's rank is not greater than max rank requirement of quests offered by npc, exactly one of the available quests will be from this pool)

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Quest.HideInScenarioGuide
member.summary: Shows ??? instead.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.RaidFinderParam.SeparatedHealerRoles
member.summary: Displays Addon#10115 instead of Addon#10093, to list pure and barrier healer count.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.RecastNavimesh.Name
member.summary: Corresponds to Name from TerritoryType.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Role.Type
member.summary: 1 = Tank, 2 = DPS, 3 = Healer

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.SatisfactionSupplyReward.MinLevelForSecondReward
member.summary: 0 == current cap

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.SecretRecipeBookGroup.SecretRecipeBook
member.summary: Index is CraftType, also used as bit index in PlayerState.UnlockedSecretRecipeBooks

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.SpecialShop.RequiredContentFinderConditionComplete
member.summary: If this is true, then the CFC needs to be completed; If this is false, then the CFC just needs to be unlocked

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.SpecialShop.ItemStruct.ItemCostsStruct.CostType
member.summary: Indicates what the Cost Id links to. 3 = SpecialBucketId, rest items?

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.Status.Flags
member.summary: actually an index of the flag

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.TerritoryIntendedUse.GayaSoundId
member.summary: Ambient noise of people talking in a crowd. Values: 0 = None, 1 = sound/strm/GAYA_LestArea_01.scd, 2 = sound/strm/GAYA_Village_01.scd

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.TerritoryIntendedUse.EnableClassJobChangeCombatJobCheck
member.summary: When true, requires that the target ClassJob is a combat job

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.TerritoryIntendedUse.EnableCompanion
member.summary: Enables summoning Chocobo Companion

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.TerritoryIntendedUse.EnablePets
member.summary: Enables summoning Summoner/Scholar pets

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.TerritoryIntendedUse.Unknown31
member.summary: Related to Idle Cam

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.TerritoryIntendedUse.Unknown38
member.summary: Related to idle timer

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.TerritoryIntendedUse.Unknown41
member.summary: Related to blocking Say/Yell/Shout of a muted player in Eureka/Bozja/OccultCrescent

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.TradeScreenImage.BannerType
member.summary: 1 = Icon 180096 ("Excellent Trade!"), 2 = Icon 180097 ("Feat Accomplished!")

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.VVDData.Series
member.summary: RowId of VVDRouteData and VVDNotebookSeries

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.VVDData.Sequence
member.summary: Sequence inside of the series.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WeeklyBingoMultipleOrder.Content
member.summary: I *think* this is correct? You're welcome MidoriKami :3

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WeeklyBingoOrderData.ContentCategory
member.summary:
1= TreasureMaps
2= PvP

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSAchievement.Category
member.summary: Seems to be 1 for Daily and 2 for Standard

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSDevGrade.Thumbnail
member.summary: The image displayed when entering the Cosmic Exploration zone on a server that is currently at this stage.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSDevGrade.LodestoneRank
member.summary: The rank for a world that is currently at this stage, as displayed on the Lodestone site, minus one.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSEmergencyInfo.WKSEmergencyMissionRowId
member.summary: Has between 5 and 6 subrows

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSEmergencyMission.WKSEmergencyMissionGroupRowId
member.summary: As of Patch 7.31 this can always be direct queried with subrow 0 to get the follow chain to WKSMissionUnit from the sheet

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSEmergencyProblem.EmergencyInfoTeleportText1
member.summary: The first option to teleport

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSEmergencyProblem.EmergencyInfoTeleportText2
member.summary: The second option to teleport

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSFunction.RequiredQuests0
member.summary: Required quest needed for function to return true

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSFunction.RequiredQuests1
member.summary: Required quest needed for function to return true

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSFunction.RequiredQuests2
member.summary: Best guess for now as no references are easily found in the game files

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSFunction.RequiredDevGrade
member.summary: Needs this grade to be completed for function to be valid. Game checks for WKSManager.DevGrade < RequiredDevGrade[]

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSFunction.Unknown12
member.summary: Seems to only control one function tree for now relating to something in WKSManager but is also slated to check for '- 2 >= 2' and fail

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSMissionReward.ExpModifier
member.summary: ExpReward = ExpToNex * (lvl < 50 ? ExpModifier[0] : lvl < 90 ? ExpModifier[1] : ExpModifier[2]) / 100

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSMissionReward.BaseDronebits
member.summary: Doesn't take Gold bonus in to account

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSMissionReward.Unknown19
member.summary: Needs to match WKSEmergencyProblem.Unknown2 to be active?

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSPioneeringTrail.Thumbnail
member.summary: The image used as thumbnail for log entry in the Infrastructure Index.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.WKSPioneeringTrail.ActivationStage
member.summary: The stage at which the log entry is added to the Infrastructure Index.

member.name: P:Lumina.Excel.Sheets.Experimental.ZoneSharedGroup.RequirementType
member.summary:
1 = Quest
2 = Quest with specific Sequence
3 = AetherCurrent
4 = EurekaStoryProgress
5 = DomaStoryProgress
